command: uv run python -m core.refresh.runner --scope all --job-key-prefix civics-roster- --force
dispatch_notes: Stage 5 replay lane: source preload ran immediately before dispatch via uv run python -m scripts.register_roster_pilot_sources and ensured all 27 roster source rows existed in core.data_source.

VM origin uses HTTPS without persistent credentials; existing PAT at /tmp/civibus-deploy/github_token (placed by deploy.yml workflow) was used via the GIT_ASKPASS pattern from infra/scripts/bootstrap_prod_vm.sh::run_git_authenticated to fetch the branch.
uv lives at /root/.local/bin/uv on the VM; PATH must be prepended for ad-hoc invocations.

Runner connected to PostgreSQL on 127.0.0.1:5433 (host port mapped from infra-db-1 container's 5432). POSTGRES_PORT=5433 explicitly exported because env_lib.sh defaults to 5432 which is not bound on this VM.

PID recorded is the bash wrapper that launched the runner under nohup setsid; the runner subprocess detached and has already finished. Stage 6 evidence must rely on the replay log path rather than the wrapper PID.
